statement: A pint of sweat will save a gallon of blood.
author: Gen. George S. Patton

statement: A good plan, violently executed now, is better than a perfect plan next week.
author: Gen. George S. Patton

statement: Lead me, follow me, or get out of my way.
author: Gen. George S. Patton

statement: Do everything you ask of those you command.
author: Gen. George S. Patton

statement: Say what you mean and mean what you say.
author: Gen. George S. Patton

statement: Many soldiers are led to faulty ideas of war by knowing too much about too little.
author: Gen. George S. Patton

statement: Never tell people how to do things. Tell them what to do and they will surprise you with their ingenuity.
author: Gen. George S. Patton

statement: If everybody is thinking alike, then somebody isn’t thinking.
author: Gen. George S. Patton

statement: Do more than is required of you.
author: Gen. George S. Patton

statement: Moral courage is the most valuable and usually the most absent characteristic in men.
author: Gen. George S. Patton

statement: I am a soldier, I fight where I am told, and I win where I fight.
author: Gen. George S. Patton
